languages.text: "Не горячитесь столь истово, коллега. Вы совершаете ошибку первого рода, считая аборигенное население способным к соблюдению ритуалов обслуживания в полной мере. Лучшее, что невежа-мирянин может сделать для работающего механизма — не вмешиваться в его работу. Впрочем, воскурение смазочных масел действительно... излишне".

"Temper yourself, colleague. You are making a category error, thinking that the indigenous population is capable of observing the rituals of service to the fullest extent. The best that an ignorant layperson can do for a working mechanism is to leave it well alone. The burning of sacred unguents, however, is... quite unnecessary."
languages.original_text: "Не горячитесь столь истово, коллега. Вы совершаете ошибку первого рода, считая аборигенное население способным к соблюдению ритуалов обслуживания в полной мере. Лучшее, что невежа-мирянин может сделать для работающего механизма — не вмешиваться в его работу. Впрочем, воскурение смазочных масел действительно... излишне".

traits.locale_text: "Temper yourself, colleague. You are making a category error, thinking that the indigenous population is capable of observing the rituals of service to the fullest extent. The best that an ignorant layperson can do for a working mechanism is to leave it well alone. The burning of sacred unguents, however, is... quite unnecessary."

"Temper yourself, colleague. You are making a category error, thinking that the indigenous population is capable of observing the rituals of service to the fullest extent. The best that an ignorant layperson can do for a working mechanism is to leave it well alone. The burning of sacred unguents, however, is... quite unnecessary."

"Temper yourself, colleague. You are making a category error, thinking that the indigenous population is capable of observing the rituals of service to the fullest extent. The best that an ignorant layperson can do for a working mechanism is to leave it well alone. The burning of sacred unguents, however, is... quite unnecessary."

languages.text: «Conténgase, mi estimado colega. Está cometiendo un error categórico al atribuir a la población local la capacidad de observar debidamente los rituales de servicio. Lo mejor que un laico ignorante puede hacer por un mecanismo operativo es dejarlo en paz. Lo de quemar ungüentos sagrados es... completamente innecesario».
languages.original_text: "Temper yourself, colleague. You are making a category error, thinking that the indigenous population is capable of observing the rituals of service to the fullest extent. The best that an ignorant layperson can do for a working mechanism is to leave it well alone. The burning of sacred unguents, however, is... quite unnecessary."

traits.locale_text: «Conténgase, mi estimado colega. Está cometiendo un error categórico al atribuir a la población local la capacidad de observar debidamente los rituales de servicio. Lo mejor que un laico ignorante puede hacer por un mecanismo operativo es dejarlo en paz. Lo de quemar ungüentos sagrados es... completamente innecesario».

languages.text: “冷静些，同僚。你犯了分类错误，竟以为本地原住民能够充分遵守侍奉的仪式。面对一台运转如常的机器，一个无知的教外人士所能做的最大贡献，就是别去碰它。至于点燃神圣机油……则毫无必要。”
languages.original_text: "Temper yourself, colleague. You are making a category error, thinking that the indigenous population is capable of observing the rituals of service to the fullest extent. The best that an ignorant layperson can do for a working mechanism is to leave it well alone. The burning of sacred unguents, however, is... quite unnecessary."

traits.locale_text: “冷静些，同僚。你犯了分类错误，竟以为本地原住民能够充分遵守侍奉的仪式。面对一台运转如常的机器，一个无知的教外人士所能做的最大贡献，就是别去碰它。至于点燃神圣机油……则毫无必要。”

languages.text: « Du calme, voyons. Il ne faudrait surtout pas croire que la population autochtone est capable d'effectuer l'ensemble des rituels de maintenance. La meilleure chose que les profanes puissent faire pour entretenir un mécanisme fonctionnel, c'est ne pas y toucher. Brûler les onguents sacrés est toutefois... hautement superflu. »
languages.original_text: "Temper yourself, colleague. You are making a category error, thinking that the indigenous population is capable of observing the rituals of service to the fullest extent. The best that an ignorant layperson can do for a working mechanism is to leave it well alone. The burning of sacred unguents, however, is... quite unnecessary."

traits.locale_text: « Du calme, voyons. Il ne faudrait surtout pas croire que la population autochtone est capable d'effectuer l'ensemble des rituels de maintenance. La meilleure chose que les profanes puissent faire pour entretenir un mécanisme fonctionnel, c'est ne pas y toucher. Brûler les onguents sacrés est toutefois... hautement superflu. »

languages.text: "Kendine hâkim ol meslektaşım. Yerel halkın hizmet ayinlerini tam anlamıyla yerine getirebileceğini düşünerek kategori hatası yapıyorsun. Cahil, sıradan insanın çalışan bir mekanizma için yapabileceği en iyi şey, onu kendi hâline bırakmaktır. Kutsal özyağların yakılması ise... Oldukça gereksiz."
languages.original_text: "Temper yourself, colleague. You are making a category error, thinking that the indigenous population is capable of observing the rituals of service to the fullest extent. The best that an ignorant layperson can do for a working mechanism is to leave it well alone. The burning of sacred unguents, however, is... quite unnecessary."

traits.locale_text: "Kendine hâkim ol meslektaşım. Yerel halkın hizmet ayinlerini tam anlamıyla yerine getirebileceğini düşünerek kategori hatası yapıyorsun. Cahil, sıradan insanın çalışan bir mekanizma için yapabileceği en iyi şey, onu kendi hâline bırakmaktır. Kutsal özyağların yakılması ise... Oldukça gereksiz."

languages.text: 「自重なさい、同僚。あなたは、土着の住民が奉仕の儀式を完全な形で執り行えるなどと考えて、カテゴリー錯誤に陥っています。無知な世俗の者が稼働中の機構のためにできる最善のことは、それにいっさい手を触れぬことです。もっとも、神聖な軟膏を焚くことは……まったく不要ですが」
languages.original_text: "Temper yourself, colleague. You are making a category error, thinking that the indigenous population is capable of observing the rituals of service to the fullest extent. The best that an ignorant layperson can do for a working mechanism is to leave it well alone. The burning of sacred unguents, however, is... quite unnecessary."

traits.locale_text: 「自重なさい、同僚。あなたは、土着の住民が奉仕の儀式を完全な形で執り行えるなどと考えて、カテゴリー錯誤に陥っています。無知な世俗の者が稼働中の機構のためにできる最善のことは、それにいっさい手を触れぬことです。もっとも、神聖な軟膏を焚くことは……まったく不要ですが」

languages.text: "Beruhigt Euch, Kollege. Ihr macht einen kategorischen Fehler, wenn Ihr denkt, dass die indigene Bevölkerung die Rituale des Dienstes vollumfänglich erfassen kann. Das Beste, was ein ignoranter Laie für einen arbeitenden Mechanismus tun kann, ist, ihn in Ruhe zu lassen. Das Verbrennen heiliger Substanzen ist hingegen ... ziemlich überflüssig."
languages.original_text: "Temper yourself, colleague. You are making a category error, thinking that the indigenous population is capable of observing the rituals of service to the fullest extent. The best that an ignorant layperson can do for a working mechanism is to leave it well alone. The burning of sacred unguents, however, is... quite unnecessary."

Das Beste, was ein ignoranter Laie für einen arbeitenden Mechanismus tun kann, ist, ihn in Ruhe zu lassen. Das Verbrennen heiliger Substanzen ist hingegen ... ziemlich überflüssig."
